name: Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 Buffer Interval Sweep on gold-92
short_description: Per-clip streaming buffer interval sweep predictions for parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 on gold-92 (93 clips), testing 500ms, 750ms, and 1000ms extraction intervals with GPU-PB TurboBias domain biasing.
model_description: nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 (NeMo ASR, CTC-Attention hybrid, 0.6B params) with GPU-PB TurboBias boosting using Rezolve 31-term domain vocabulary, alpha=1.0.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: clip_id (string), duration_s (float), transcript (string), reference_text (string), is_empty (bool), is_hallucination (bool), ttfd_seconds (float), latency_seconds (float), interval_ms (int), n_chunks (int), n_inferences (int).

files.description: Per-clip predictions at 500ms buffer extraction interval (93 clips)
Per-clip predictions at 750ms buffer extraction interval (93 clips)
Per-clip predictions at 1000ms buffer extraction interval (93 clips)
